text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I tell Mihono Bourbon about our plans<n>regarding
training and promo concerts<n>leading up to the
Grand Concert.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
choice_data_list: I'm asking what you think, not ordering you.
I'm asking what you think, not ordering you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Light Hello described the Grand<n>Concert as a
stage for runners to<n>convey their gratitude.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: That's why, if Bourbon's going toperform, I want her to do it becauseshe wants to, not because I "order"her to.
choice_data_list: If you want, you can observe first before deciding.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If there ever comes a day when she<n>wants to
perform of her own volition,<n>then we'll talk about
getting her up on<n>stage.
